Join a team that puts patients first. Work flexibly, care deeply, and help expand access to mental health support—wherever you are.

Why work with us ?

Deliver personalised, high-quality care designed to exceed patient expectations.

Competitive compensation

Starting rate from $90 per hour + a progressively increasing long-term bonus structure + quarterly bonuses of up to $1,000 per month.

Get paid anytime

Appointment payments appear on your dashboard after 15 days and can be withdrawn anytime.

Flexible schedules

Set your own schedule with flexibility - You can set your available hours exactly as you wish.

Remote work

Deliver care from anywhere in Canada. No commuting - just focus on what you do best.
